title: [Micro - YTP] Rare version of 'SEGASonic Cosmo Fighter'
description:
An extremely rare version of 'SEGASonic Cosmo Fighter' featuring an English dub was found back in 2021. This is the opening scene with Sonic.

#ytp #youtubepoop #sonicthehedgehog
